title: Support - Verify that data is correct after moving from Guest to Account linked to a Tenant
scenario: Support data (app version, tenant name, tenant ID, user ID, last connected) correctly displays in Poly Lens Menu > Support > App after switching from Guest mode to a Tenant-linked Account
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. Ensure the app is in Guest mode (not logged into any account).
4. Tap the Menu icon (hamburger menu) to open the side navigation panel.
6. In the Support screen, locate the 'App' section and note the displayed support data: app version, tenant name, tenant id, user id, and last connected.
8. Log into an Account that is linked to a Tenant.
9. Navigate again to the Menu → Support → App section.
10. Observe the support data fields (app version, tenant name, tenant id, user id, last connected) now displayed.
expected: After moving from Guest mode to an Account linked to a Tenant, the Support > App section correctly displays the updated support data: app version, tenant name, tenant id, user id, and last connected information.
